jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
